mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO task_submit_form ( start_time, host, task_description, excution_frequency, task_parameters_value, task_parameters_name, trigger_status, trigger_severity, trigger_name, trigger_description ) VALUES (
#{startTime}, #{host}, #{taskDes}, #{excutionFrequency}, #{taskParametersValue}, #{taskParametersName}, #{status}, #{severity}, #{triggerName}, #{triggerDes} )
